entries.title: On Colossians 1:15–18
entries.excerpt: Colossians 1:15-18 Who is the Image of the invisible God, the Firstborn of all creation: for in Him were all things created, in the heavens, and upon the earth, things visible and things invisible, whether thrones or dominions or principalities or powers: all things have been created through Him, and unto Him; and He is before all things, and in Him all things consist. And He is the head of the body, the Church. Today it is necessary for me to pay the debt, which yesterday I deferred, in order that I might address it to your minds when in full force.
